title: Finance & Data Research Analyst (Remote)
description: Role Finance & Data Research Analyst (Remote)Location 100 Remote (Global)We are seeking a meticulous and analytical Finance & Data Research Analyst to join our customers team. This remote, part-time role focuses on uncovering valuable financial insights by expertly navigating diverse data sources, synthesizing information, and communicating actionable findings. The ideal candidate thrives in a detail-oriented environment, enjoys resource discovery, and has strong financial literacy.Role Overview
